Highlights.title: Why this branch is special
Highlights.subtitle: Built for groups, families, and good nights out.

PricingPreview.title: Bowl all night, every night
PricingPreview.subtitle: Transparent pricing - pay per game or per lane.

Pricing.title: Pricing
Pricing.intro: All prices are per person unless marked otherwise.

PackagesTeaser.title: Birthdays & Group Events
PackagesTeaser.subtitle: We host the party - you take the credit.

BirthdaysTeaser.title: Want to celebrate with us?
BirthdaysTeaser.subtitle: An unforgettable party with ready-made packages, our team and a cake ceremony.

MenuPage.title: Our menu
MenuPage.subtitle: Fresh from our kitchen, delivered to the lane.
MenuPage.footnote: * Menu changes seasonally and by stock availability.

Vouchers.title: Gift vouchers
Vouchers.subtitle: A gift everyone loves. Sent digitally, valid one year, redeemable at any branch.
Vouchers.agree: I agree to the voucher terms
Vouchers.comingSoon: Payment activates soon — questions? message us on WhatsApp.

Birthdays.title: Birthdays at Bowling
Birthdays.subtitle: Bowling for every kid, a host, a birthday table at the restaurant, and the cake ceremony — we handle it all. Total runtime ~1.5–2 hours.

howItWorks.title: Four simple steps
howItWorks.freebies: Throughout the event, free water and raspberry pitchers for the kids — no charge.

packages.title: Birthday packages
packages.subtitle: 20-kid minimum. Add per kid above the minimum.

policy.title: Booking policy
policy.subtitle: Worth a read before reserving the date
policy.footnote: Minimum age 8. Final confirmation is set with the office and the bowling schedule.

deposit.label: Booking deposit
deposit.body: ₪ 200 deposit to lock the event — credited toward the final bill.

form.label: Commitment form
form.body: After paying the deposit, sign the commitment form linked on the site.

cancel.label: Reschedule & cancel
cancel.body: You can reschedule or cancel up to 7 days before. Less than that, the deposit is non-refundable.

winter.label: December–February
winter.body: Saturday birthdays cannot be booked in December, January, or February.

shared.label: Open to the public
shared.body: The venue is not closed off — other groups may be there at the same time.

arrival.label: Arrival & lanes
arrival.body: Arrive 15 min early. Lane allocation is finalized 10 min before.

payment.label: Payment
payment.body: Cash or credit on-site only, no installments. For one bill at the end, leave a card on file.

lead.title: Ready to lock a date?
lead.subtitle: We'll get back within 24 hours to confirm the date and the commitment form.
lead.agree: I have read and agreed to the commitment form and booking policy
lead.disclaimer: Submitting this form is not a confirmation of the event; final confirmation is set with the office.

Gallery.title: Inside the venue
Gallery.subtitle: A peek at the lanes, the lights, and the fun.

Menu.title: Eat, drink, bowl
Menu.subtitle: Snacks, mains, and drinks served lane-side.

Contact.title: Contact
Contact.intro: Send us a message - we usually reply within an hour.

form.name: Full name
form.success: Thanks - we'll get back to you shortly!
form.error: Something went wrong. Please try again or message us on WhatsApp.

Footer.tagline: Family-friendly bowling, kitchen and party packages - Ramat Gan and Rishon LeTsiyon.

WhatsApp.label: Chat on WhatsApp
WhatsApp.prefilled: Hi! I'd like to book lanes at {branch}. Can you help?

translate.rateLimit: Translation limit reached. Try again in an hour.
translate.tooManyFields: Too many fields to translate at once.
translate.needSource: Fill at least one Hebrew field first.

reviews.title: Google reviews
reviews.description: Synced daily from the Google Places API. Missing locales are AI-translated.
reviews.connectHelp: Find your Place ID at <link>Google's Place ID finder</link>.
reviews.neverSynced: Never synced. Add a place ID, then press Refresh.

general.title: General settings
general.description: Business details, opening hours, popups, SEO, domains and legal pages.

pricelists.title: Pricelists
pricelists.description: Manage food & bar, game pricing, and birthday packages.

popups.placeholderBody: Popup and announcement management is coming soon. Contact us to set one up.

domains.pageDescription: Connect custom domains to this branch. Visitors who reach any of these hosts see this branch's site automatically. Add the domain here, then point its DNS record at Vercel — the branch loads at that URL.
domains.title: Domains
domains.description: Each host maps to exactly one branch (case-insensitive, port stripped).
domains.empty: No domains mapped to this branch yet.
domains.confirmDeleteDescription: This unlinks {host} from this branch. Cannot be undone.

tooltips.host: Public hostname like rgbowling.com (no protocol, no port). Each host can map to only one branch.

tooltips.slug: URL-safe identifier used in /legal/'<slug>'. Lowercase with hyphens (e.g., privacy-policy). Changing the slug breaks existing links.
tooltips.sortOrder: Order pages appear in footer legal link groups. Lower numbers first.
tooltips.published: When off, the page is hidden from the public site and returns 404. Useful for drafts.
tooltips.pageTitle: Page heading and '<title>' tag. Keep it human — shown to users and search engines.
tooltips.body: Markdown content of the page. Renders with headings, lists, bold, italic, and links.

packages.title: Packages
packages.confirmDeleteDescription: This removes the package. Cannot be undone.

tooltips.titleLabel: Display name of the package (e.g., Birthday Package, Family Pack).
tooltips.perks: Comma- or pipe-separated list of what's included. Rendered on the package card.

prices.title: Prices
prices.label: Label
prices.confirmDeleteDescription: This removes the row. Cannot be undone.

tooltips.label: Per-locale display label (e.g., Adult game, Shoe rental).

menu.title: Menu
menu.itemsCount: {count, plural, =0 {no items} one {# item} other {# items}}
menu.itemsEmpty: No items in this category yet.
menu.confirmDeleteCategoryDescription: This removes the category and all its items. Cannot be undone.
menu.confirmDeleteItemDescription: This removes the item. Cannot be undone.

tooltips.categoryTitle: Section heading on the public menu (e.g., Snacks, Mains, Drinks).
tooltips.itemName: Dish name as shown on the public menu.
tooltips.itemTag: Optional badge shown next to the item (e.g., Bestseller, Spicy, New).

media.title: Media
media.description: Images and assets used across all branches.
media.fileHint: JPEG, PNG, WebP, or AVIF. Up to 5MB.

errors.forbidden: You do not have permission for this action.

form.googlePlaceIdHint: Sub-project G will wire the Places API
form.dangerZoneDescription: Deleting a branch removes all related content. This cannot be undone.
form.confirmDeleteDescription: This removes the branch and all related content. Cannot be undone.

tooltips.slug: URL-safe identifier used in /branches/'<slug>' paths. Lowercase with hyphens (e.g., ramat-gan). Cannot change after creation without breaking links.
tooltips.sortOrder: Controls the order branches appear in public lists and the branch picker. Lower numbers first.
tooltips.phone: Shown on the contact card and linked via tel: on mobile. Use international format (+972 3-123-4567).
tooltips.whatsapp: Phone number (digits only, country code first, no +) used to build wa.me links for the floating WhatsApp button. Example: 972545751100.
tooltips.email: Public contact email shown in the footer and on the contact page.
tooltips.mapUrl: Google Maps link opened when users tap the address. Find the venue on maps.google.com, click Share → Copy link.
tooltips.latitude: Decimal latitude used for the schema.org GeoCoordinates. From Google Maps, right-click the pin and copy the first number.
tooltips.longitude: Decimal longitude used for the schema.org GeoCoordinates. From Google Maps, right-click the pin and copy the second number.
tooltips.published: When off, the branch is hidden from the public site and sitemap. Admin can still edit it.
tooltips.displayName: Full branch name shown in page titles, headings, and the branch picker. Include the brand + city (e.g., Bowling Ramat Gan).
tooltips.shortName: Compact label used in the top nav and tight UI slots. Usually just the city.
tooltips.address: Street address displayed on the contact card and included in schema.org PostalAddress.
tooltips.city: City name used in schema.org PostalAddress and default SEO copy.
tooltips.heroImageId: Large banner image shown at the top of the public branch page. Upload in the Media library first, then pick it here.
tooltips.heroHeadline: Short headline overlaid on the hero image. Aim for 3–6 words.
tooltips.heroTagline: One-sentence subtitle under the headline. Describe what makes this branch special.
tooltips.seoTitle: Page '<title>' tag used by search engines and social shares. 50–60 characters is ideal.
tooltips.seoDescription: Meta description used by Google and social previews. 140–160 characters.
tooltips.googlePlaceId: Identifier from Google Maps Place Details. Find it at developers.google.com/maps/documentation/places/web-service/place-id (used by sub-project G to sync ratings/reviews).
